basic_details.job_title: District AYUSH Society Garhwa District Program Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: District AYUSH Society Garhwa has published the District Program Manager Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 District Program Manager position. Candidates aged 21 to 60 years who hold a Graduation degree in any discipline (including AYUSH) along with an MBA in Healthcare Management/ Master's in Health/ Hospital Administration/ Post Graduate Diploma in Hospital & Healthcare Management (2 years from an AICTE-recognized institute) and a minimum of one year of experience in a Public Health Programme are eligible to apply online on or before 15-07-2026. The official notification

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 60 years Age as on 01-06-2026

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation degree in any discipline including AYUSH and MBA in Healthcare Management/Masters in health/hospital administration/Post Graduation diploma in Hospital & healthcare management (Two years) from AICTE recognized institute, Minimum 1 year working experience in Public health programme
qualification.details: Graduation degree in any discipline including AYUSH and MBA in Healthcare Management/Masters in health/hospital administration/Post Graduation diploma in Hospital & healthcare management (Two years) from AICTE recognized institute. Minimum 1 year working experience in Public health programme.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the District AYUSH Society Garhwa District Program Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of District AYUSH Society Garhwa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the District AYUSH Society Garhwa District Program Manager Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of District AYUSH Society Garhwa to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District AYUSH Society Garhwa District Program Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Program Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the District Program Manager post is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the District Program Manager position?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the District Program Manager position released by the District AYUSH Society Garhwa.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the District Program Manager role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduation degree in any discipline including AYUSH and an MBA in Healthcare Management or equivalent, with at least 1 year of experience in public health programs.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the District Program Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the District Program Manager post is between 21 years and 60 years, as of 01-06-2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the District Program Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000 for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the District Program Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes evaluation of academic marks and experience, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the District Program Manager post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the District AYUSH Society Garhwa?
faq.answer: The official website of the District AYUSH Society Garhwa is garhwa.nic.in.
